title: Finn's Safari Friends
synopsis: Little Finn explores the savanna and meets friendly animals who each make their special sounds, learning about elephants, lions, zebras, and giraffes in a gentle adventure.

pages.text: Little Finn walks in the golden grass. The sun is warm and bright.

illustration.description: A small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass under a warm orange sunset sky, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm colors

pages.text: Look! A big elephant waves her trunk. 'Hello!' trumpets the elephant.

illustration.description: A friendly gray elephant with an expressive face waving her trunk at a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes against golden grass and orange sunset

pages.text: A lion stretches and yawns. 'Roar!' says the sleepy lion softly.

illustration.description: A golden lion with a fluffy mane stretching and yawning near a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in textured gouache with warm savanna colors and bold confident strokes

pages.text: Three zebras run and play. Their stripes are black and white. 'Neigh!' call the zebras.

illustration.description: Three playful zebras with bold black and white stripes running past a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in thick gouache brushstrokes with golden grass and warm orange sunset colors

pages.text: A tall giraffe bends down. Her spots are pretty. She says nothing, but smiles.

illustration.description: A gentle spotted giraffe bending her long neck down to look at a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted with expressive gouache techniques in warm savanna colors with textured painterly strokes

pages.text: Finn waves goodbye to all his new friends. The animals wave back. What a happy day!

illustration.description: A small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to an elephant, lion, zebras, and giraffe all gathered together, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, golden grass, and a beautiful orange sunset sky
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to all the animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: The elephant trumpets 'Hello!' when she waves her trunk at Finn.

questions.question: What colors are the zebra's stripes?
questions.explanation: The zebras have black and white stripes as they run and play.

questions.question: Which animal is the tallest?
questions.explanation: The giraffe is described as tall and bends her long neck down to see Finn.
